ops.title: Speculate-while-you-verify convention + capt-hook performance pack
ops.body:
**Decision (2026-07-18, user-directed):** verify → fix is no longer serialized. When verification lanes dispatch (ground-truth repro loops, adversarial review, security passes) with a concrete candidate fix already in hand — any concrete fix, not just bounded ones — the fix is built concurrently in a worktree-isolated background lane, routed per the Models table. The speculative lane never ships on its own: a confirming verdict applies the already-built fix; a refuting one discards the worktree. Worktree isolation is load-bearing: a speculative edit on the shared working copy corrupts the in-flight verification (e.g. a looped `-race` observing a mutating tree) and collides with concurrent cc-pool sessions.

**Where it lives:**
- Rule: `plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md` (**Speculate while you verify.**, after Quality patterns) → renders into fleet CLAUDE.md § Plan Execution & Orchestration; cross-ref clause in `plugin/guides/md/parallelize.md` (AGENTS.md § Parallelize Independent Work). cc-skills b04c71a67991 (fragments) + follow-up render commit.
- Enforcement: new capt-hook builtin pack **performance** (0.1.0) — `captain_hook/packs/performance/pipelining.py`, two one-shot declarative nudges (Workflow surface via `WorkflowScript` pattern; Agent/Task surface via `ToolInput` prompt regex; skip on worktree/implement/applied markers). captain-hook 6fa8273711df, released as v10.1.0 (PyPI live-verified: released dispatch fires on verify-shaped input, silent on benign).
- Enablement: fleet-wide via `[packs.performance]` in `plugin/guides/toml/capt-hook-base.toml` — every consumer picks it up on its daily guides cron (pull-only, no sweep). Ordering held: PyPI 10.1.0 was live before the fragment landed on main.

Also cleaned up: dead legacy `.claude/hooks/packs.toml` deleted (never read post capt-hook 10.0.0 packs-unify).
